name: ticketz
description: Monorepo scripts — backend/frontend packages stay in their folders

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run dev:server --prefix backend
scripts.db:migrate: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run db:migrate --prefix backend
scripts.db:seed: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run db:seed --prefix backend
scripts.db:reset: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.dev.yml down -v && npm run dev:up
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
